map.clear.probe:
//@version=6
indicator("probe")
m0 = map.new<string, float>()
map.clear(m0)
plot(close)

map.put_all.probe:
//@version=6
indicator("probe")
m0 = map.new<string, float>()
m1 = map.new<string, float>()
map.put_all(m0, m1)
plot(close)
map.put_all.note: Manual 2026-06-08 probe: zero-arg, id1-only, and named-arg variants all crash TV (TypeError: a.pinePos). Both maps supplied -> clean. Both params assumed required: TV never compiles the call without either.
